ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., researcher, librarian, administrator) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manuscript being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the manuscript */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the manuscript was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the manuscript */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device information) of the user */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the user accessing the manuscript */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_access_type FOREIGN KEY ("access_type") REFERENCES access_types ("access_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the permission */,
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manuscript associated with the permission */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Permission to view the manuscript */,
  "can_download" INTEGER /* Permission to download the manuscript */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Permission to edit the manuscript details */,
  "permission_granted_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was granted */,
  "permission_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the permission expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manuscript_rights" (
  "rights_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rights statement */,
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manuscript the rights statement pertains to */,
  "statement" TEXT /* Text of the rights statement */,
  "rights_type" TEXT /* Type of rights (e.g., copyright, Creative Commons) */,
  "rights_holder" TEXT /* Holder of the rights */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rights_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manuscript associated with the metadata */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata entry (e.g., 'source', 'bucketeer_state') */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata entry */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., descriptive, structural, preservation) */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_types" (
  "access_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access type */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Description of the access type (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the access type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manuscript_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "collection_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)
